title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, stream, and pull models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embedding provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, file upload, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, stream, pull, and manage models from JVM applications.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat, stream, and list local models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-powered CLI that wraps Ollama with fuzzy-finder model selection and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama in containers.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama with async streaming and embedding APIs.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams answers from any Ollama model in guild channels or DMs.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams query local Ollama models via slash commands or app mentions.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-model-hub
summary: Official registry of 150+ community-contributed Modelfiles (Llama 3, Phi-3, CodeGemma, etc.).

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All UI can optionally delegate to a local Ollama instance for model management and inference.

title: ollama-reddit
summary: Active subreddit for Ollama news, model sharing, troubleshooting and feature requests.
